title: Uruguayan Salad with Peanuts
description: A fresh and crunchy salad inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, topped with peanuts for added crunch. This salad is perfect for a light and healthy meal.

ingredients.name: Salad
ingredients.notes: Cherry tomatoes halved and cucumber sliced

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the dynamic lettuce and peppery arugula.
2. Add the salad (cherry tomatoes and cucumber) on top of the lettuce mixture.
3. Sprinkle the Uruguayan cheese over the salad.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
5. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
6. Sprinkle the peanuts over the top of the salad.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
